answer.om: Galmeen barattootaa karaa qajeelfama yuunivarsiitii fi waajjira galmee (Registrar) hordofuun raawwatama.
answer.en: Student registration is completed by following university registration procedures and registrar office instructions.
answer.am: የተማሪዎች ምዝገባ በዩኒቨርሲቲው መመሪያ እና በሬጂስትራር ቢሮ ሂደት ይከናወናል።

answer.om: Sanadoonni barbaachisan yeroo galmee irratti yuunivarsiitichi beeksisa.
answer.en: Required documents are announced by the university during the registration period.
answer.am: አስፈላጊ ሰነዶች በምዝገባ ጊዜ በዩኒቨርሲቲው ይገለጻሉ።

answer.om: Yeroo fi haala online registration yuunivarsiitichi beeksisa.
answer.en: Online registration availability depends on university announcements.
answer.am: የመስመር ላይ ምዝገባ በዩኒቨርሲቲው ማስታወቂያ መሰረት ይወሰናል።
